title: Indian Oil Corporation is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Indian Oil Corporation is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Indian Oil Corporation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Indian Oil Corporation:
Indian Oil Corporation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indian Oil Corporation!
